data.content: Shipment review approved. Feature commits 09ad156b2d2a and 217ae27552f4 verified on main. Bulk terminal-state Select (Shipped/Abandoned/Deferred) is correctly wired: bulkTerminalStates constant, onBulkUpdate({ state: v }) flow. All quality gates pass: 2042 tests passed, build clean, tsc clean. No new lint issues. Unmerged reset-fix branches address pre-existing UX limitation (repeated same-value selection) shared by all bulk selects — not a regression.
